{{Infobox event
| name = Archlord revelation
| introduced = Reaper
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|An [[Archlord]] revelation is a personal oath that an individual dedicates themselves to with complete honesty and full commitment. This dedication serves as a defining element of their future path. While the specific nature of a revelation can vary—such as an oath to bring light—it is fundamentally tied to the individual's destiny. Reaching this stage of power allows for increased sensitivity to [[Icons]], though some individuals may attempt to alter their revelation if the projected future does not suit them.}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Archlord revelation]] is about [[Lindon]]'s future.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23">''Reaper'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|An [[Archlord revelation]] is an oath to which one dedicates their future.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13">''Waybound'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ziel]]'s [[Archlord revelation]] is tied to his desire to protect his sect.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14">''Waybound'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]]'s [[Archlord revelation]] was 'To bring light.'<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c25">''Waybound'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]]'s [[Archlord revelation]] was that she was meant to kill monsters.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27">''Waybound'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Mercy]] possesses an [[Archlord revelation]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“I will give my life for the sect.” His Archlord revelation.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle events]]
